name: Mashed Potatoes (Taurus)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds potatoes (4 medium), peeled and cubed
1/2 cup yellow onion (1 small), finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, place the potatoes and onions with enough salted water to cover.
Bring to a boil, then simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes or until tender.
Drain.
2. Transfer the potatoes and onion to a bowl.
3. Mash using a potato masher or force through a ricer.
4. Stir in milk (or yogurt), margarine, salt, and white pepper.
5. Serve 4 servings.
